User-agent: Slurp
Allow: /

Allow: /

User-agent: Baiduspider
Allow: /

User-agent: YandexBot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

# Block bad bots
User-agent: AhrefsBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: SemrushBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: MJ12bot
Disallow: /

User-agent: DotBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: BLEXBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: Screaming Frog SEO Spider
Disallow: /

# Rate limiting for aggressive bots
User-agent: *
Crawl-delay: 2
